mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_confirmation (order_id, service_date, status, worker_confirm_time, employer_confirm_time, auto_confirm_time, dispute_reason, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{serviceDate}, #{status}, #{workerConfirmTime}, #{employerConfirmTime}, #{autoConfirmTime}, #{disputeReason}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM daily_confirmation WHERE status = 0 AND service_date < CURDATE() AND worker_confirm_time IS NOT NULL AND worker_confirm_time <= #{thresholdTime}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO daily_confirmation (order_id, service_date, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.serviceDate}, #{item.status}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})
